description: An open-source compliance framework that rationalizes ~315 controls across 25 domains, mapping requirements from 20+ industry standards including SOC 2, ISO 27001/27002, PCI DSS v4.0, FedRAMP, HIPAA, NIST CSF, CIS Controls v8, and more.

control_families.name: Asset Management
control_families.description: Maintain accurate inventories of information systems, applications, and media assets to ensure all assets are tracked, labeled, and reconciled throughout their lifecycle.

control_families.name: Business Continuity
control_families.description: Establish, maintain, and test business continuity and disaster recovery plans to ensure critical services can be restored within defined recovery objectives.
example_controls: BC-02 Business Continuity Plan: Personal Health Information
BC-03 Business Continuity Plan: Roles and Responsibilities

control_families.name: Backup Management
control_families.description: Configure, test, and protect backups of critical data and systems, including alternate storage and telecommunications, to support recovery objectives.

control_families.name: Configuration Management
control_families.description: Establish and maintain baseline configuration standards for systems and networks, enforce deny-all defaults, and monitor for unauthorized configuration changes.
example_controls: CFM-03 Remote Access: Prohibited Protocols and Commands

control_families.name: Change Management
control_families.description: Implement a governed workflow for requesting, approving, testing, and communicating changes to systems, code, and infrastructure.
example_controls: CHM-04 Communication of Maintenance and Downtime

control_families.name: Customer Managed Security
control_families.description: Provide controls and capabilities that allow customers to manage their own administrative access, authentication, and security monitoring within the service.

control_families.name: Cryptography
control_families.description: Manage the full lifecycle of cryptographic keys and enforce encryption of data in transit and at rest using approved algorithms and key management practices.
example_controls: CRY-05 Encryption of Data in Transit

control_families.name: Data Management
control_families.description: Classify, inventory, and govern data throughout its lifecycle, including handling personal information access requests, retention, disposal, and cross-border transfers.

control_families.name: Entity Management
control_families.description: Define and maintain the organizational governance structure, including board oversight, audit functions, legal entity management, and strategic operating plans.
example_controls: EM-01 Board of Directors Structure and Purpose

control_families.name: Identity and Access Management
control_families.description: Provision, review, and de-provision logical access rights using least-privilege principles, multi-factor authentication, privileged account controls, and centralized identity management.

control_families.name: Incident Response
control_families.description: Establish, test, and execute an incident response plan covering detection, response, containment, external communication, and post-incident review.

control_families.name: Mobile Device Management
control_families.description: Enroll, encrypt, and apply configuration management policies to mobile devices, including controls for high-risk travel locations.
example_controls: MDM-04 Configuration Management: High Risk Travel Locations

control_families.name: Network Operations
control_families.description: Design and enforce network segmentation, firewall rules, traffic filtering, and secure remote access to protect the network perimeter and internal segments.
example_controls: NO-02 Inbound and Outbound Network Traffic: DMZ Requirements

control_families.name: People Resources
control_families.description: Manage the employment lifecycle including background checks, hiring, performance management, disciplinary processes, and secure offboarding.

control_families.name: Privacy
control_families.description: Implement and maintain a privacy program that governs personal information collection, notice, consent, disclosure, and compliance with applicable privacy regulations.
example_controls: PRIV-05 Personal Information Notice and Consent: Additional Processing Activities

control_families.name: Proactive Security
control_families.description: Deploy advanced threat detection and response capabilities including endpoint detection and response (EDR), threat hunting, threat modeling, and adversary intelligence.

control_families.name: Risk Management
control_families.description: Identify, assess, treat, and continuously monitor risks to the organization's systems and services, including formal risk ratings, self-assessments, and internal audits.

control_families.name: System Design Documentation
control_families.description: Create and maintain system documentation and whitepapers that describe the architecture, data flows, and security properties of information systems.

control_families.name: Security Governance
control_families.description: Establish and maintain the information security program, including policies, standards, exception management, document control, and security steering.

control_families.name: Service Lifecycle
control_families.description: Apply security controls across the software development and service delivery lifecycle, including source code management, secrets handling, authorization, and decommissioning.

control_families.name: Systems Monitoring
control_families.description: Collect, protect, and review audit logs and security events across the environment to support detection, investigation, and compliance reporting.
example_controls: SM-03 Audit Logging: Cardholder Data Environment Activity
SM-04 Audit Logging: Cardholder Data Environment Event Information
SM-05 Audit Logging: Service Provider Logging Requirements

control_families.name: Site Operations
control_families.description: Control and monitor physical access to facilities, protect cabling and equipment, manage environmental controls, and conduct regular physical security reviews.
example_controls: SO-02 Physical Protection and Positioning of Cabling
SO-03 Global Coordination of Critical Functions: Information Security Safeguards

control_families.name: Training and Awareness
control_families.description: Deliver role-appropriate security training and awareness programs covering general security, phishing, developer secure coding, code of conduct, and payment card security.

control_families.name: Third-Party Management
control_families.description: Assess, contract with, monitor, and offboard third-party vendors and service providers, ensuring they meet the organization's security and privacy requirements.

control_families.name: Vulnerability Management
control_families.description: Continuously scan, track, and remediate vulnerabilities across the environment, including application penetration testing, patch management, and exploit risk scoring.
example_controls: VM-02 Vulnerability Scans: Cardholder Data Environment
VM-03 Vulnerability Scans: Audit Log Review
